summary: Phase 5 testing completed. All backend APIs (14/14 tests passed) and frontend features verified. New features: Custom stats CRUD, Task steps (subtasks), LinkedStats bonus on task completion, 'Додати' button in TaskList header.
passed_tests: Backend API Tests (14/14 passed):
- POST /api/user/custom-stats - create custom stat with label, icon, color
- GET /api/user/custom-stats - retrieve custom stats list
- PUT /api/user/custom-stats/{id} - update custom stat label/icon
- DELETE /api/user/custom-stats/{id} - delete with points return
- DELETE /api/user/custom-stats/{id} - 404 for nonexistent stat
- POST /api/tasks with linkedStats and steps fields
- POST /api/tasks/{id}/steps - add step to task
- POST /api/tasks/{id}/steps/{stepId}/toggle - toggle step completion
- DELETE /api/tasks/{id}/steps/{stepId} - delete step from task
- POST /api/tasks/{id}/complete - linkedStats bonus applied (+1 to linked stats)
- POST /api/user/allocate-custom-stats - allocate points to custom stats
- POST /api/tasks/{id}/steps - 404 for nonexistent task
- POST /api/tasks/{id}/steps/{stepId}/toggle - graceful handling of nonexistent step
- GET/POST /api/tasks - tasks endpoint working for add button
Frontend UI Tests:
- 'Додати' button in TaskList header (data-testid='add-task-header-btn') - VERIFIED
- Button focuses task input when clicked - VERIFIED
- QuickAddTask form with 'Додаткові опції' button - VERIFIED
- Steps section (Кроки підзавдання) in advanced options - VERIFIED
- Linked stats selection in advanced options - VERIFIED
- Steps progress bar in task card (Кроки: X/Y, percentage) - VERIFIED
- Expandable steps section with checkboxes and delete buttons - VERIFIED
- Add new step input in expanded section - VERIFIED
- CharacterStats component with 'Додати кастомну характеристику' button - VERIFIED
- Custom stat creation form with icon/color selection - VERIFIED
- Custom stat delete button (red trash icon) - VERIFIED
- Toast notifications for actions - VERIFIED
critical_code_review_comments: LinkedStats bonus logic in server.py line 600 has complex condition but works correctly
Custom stats appear in QuickAddTask form alongside default stats for linking
test_credentials: New users register via UI. Test users created with unique emails.
seed_data_creation: Multiple test users created during testing with unique emails (test_phase5_*, uitest_*, steptest_*, linkedtest_*, stattest_*)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 features implemented and working: 1) Custom stats CRUD (POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/user/custom-stats), 2) Task steps (POST/DELETE /api/tasks/{id}/steps, toggle), 3) LinkedStats bonus on task completion (+1 to linked stats), 4) 'Додати' button in TaskList header focuses QuickAddTask input, 5) QuickAddTask advanced options with steps and linkedStats selection, 6) Steps progress bar in task cards. Backend tests in /app/backend/tests/test_phase5_features.py. Features unlock at level 3 for Habits/Quests/Mission/Rewards/Shop tabs.
